allow: Bash(node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>s+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const d=JSON.parse\(s\);console.log\('PATHS:'\);for\(const [p,methods] of Object.entries\(d.paths||{}\)\){for\(const m of Object.keys\(methods\)\){const op=methods[m];console.log\(' ',m.toUpperCase\(\),p,'-',op.summary||op.operationId||''\);}}console.log\('\\\\nSCHEMAS:'\);for\(const k of Object.keys\(d.components?.schemas||{}\)\){console.log\(' ',k\);}}\)")
Bash(curl -s -i -X OPTIONS http://localhost:5090/users -H "Origin: http://localhost:5173" -H "Access-Control-Request-Method: POST" -H "Access-Control-Request-Headers: content-type")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5090/users -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"userName":"Smoke User","universityName":"Warsaw University of Technology","numberOfPublications":3}' -w " \(POST /users: %{http_code}\)\\n")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5090/users -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"userName":"Eligible Researcher","universityName":"University of Cambridge","numberOfPublications":12}' -w " \(POST /users: %{http_code}\)\\n")
